Growth Evaluation Accounts
Discover Growth Evaluation accounts designed as the perfect stepping stone for developing traders.

April 2, 2026

Table of contents

Tradeify offers Growth Evaluation accounts with account sizes of $25k, $50k, $100k & $150k.

How Growth Differs from SELECT Evaluation

Growth Evaluation is NOT the same as SELECT Evaluation. Here are the key differences:

Feature

Growth Evaluation

SELECT Evaluation

Minimum Trading Days

1 day (can pass immediately)

3 days (due to consistency rule)

Consistency Rule

None

Yes - 40% (no single day > 40% of profit)

Daily Loss Limit

Yes (soft breach)

None during evaluation

Payout Policy

Fixed policy (no choice)

Choose AFTER passing (Flex or Daily)

In summary: Growth Evaluation is the fastest way to get funded - you can pass in just 1 trading day because there is NO consistency requirement. However, Growth has a Daily Loss Limit (soft breach) that you must respect. SELECT takes longer (minimum 3 days) but gives you more intraday flexibility with no daily loss limit.

Growth Evaluation Rules

The rules for Growth Evaluation are stated in the table below.

$1,500

50k

The Growth Evaluation uses an End of Day Trailing Max Drawdown, which is calculated and based on the account balance at the end of the trading day.

For more information on this type of drawdown, see our full article here.

The Growth Evaluation accounts offers more flexibility during the trading day, as intraday fluctuations won’t affect the drawdown level. This allows you to hold positions with less risk of hitting the drawdown limit due to temporary losses.

There is no activation fee for Growth Simulated Funded accounts, and the Simulated Funded counterpart cannot be reset.

Billing & Purchase Model

Growth Evaluation accounts are a one-time purchase. There are no recurring subscription charges.

Passing the Evaluation / Activations

- There is no time activation fee.

- If you pass an Evaluation, you'll receive an email notification once dashboard reconciliation occurs, typically between 6-8 PM Eastern Time.

- Daily Activation Limit: You can activate a maximum of 5 Growth Funded accounts per day. The limit resets every 24 hours (UTC). Additional qualified accounts must wait until the next day.

Reset Credits

- Using a Reset Credit does not affect your account timeline. Your account remains active from the original purchase date.

For more information on the payout policies for the Growth Sim Funded account click here.

Frequently Asked Questions

Q: Does Growth Evaluation have a consistency rule?

A: No, Growth Evaluation does NOT have a consistency requirement. You can pass your Growth Evaluation in as few as 1 trading day by hitting the profit target. This differs from SELECT Evaluation, which requires 40% consistency and takes a minimum of 3 trading days to pass.

Q: Does Growth Evaluation have a Daily Loss Limit?

A: Yes, Growth Evaluation DOES have a Daily Loss Limit (soft breach). The limits are: $600 (25K), $1,250 (50K), $2,500 (100K), $3,750 (150K). If you hit this limit, trading is stopped for the day but your account is not failed. This differs from SELECT Evaluation, which has NO daily loss limit during the evaluation phase.

Q: Can I pass Growth Evaluation in one day?

A: Yes, Growth Evaluation can be passed in just 1 trading day because there is no consistency requirement. You simply need to hit the profit target while staying within the drawdown and daily loss limits. This is the fastest evaluation option - SELECT requires a minimum of 3 trading days due to its 40% consistency rule.

Q: What's the difference between Growth and SELECT Evaluation?

A: The main differences are: (1) Growth can pass in 1 day with no consistency rule, while SELECT requires 3+ days due to 40% consistency. (2) Growth HAS a daily loss limit (soft breach), while SELECT has NO daily loss limit during evaluation. (3) Growth has a fixed payout policy, while SELECT lets you choose your payout policy (Flex or Daily) AFTER passing. See the comparison table at the top of this article for a full breakdown.

Q: Can I choose my payout policy on Growth like I can with SELECT?

A: No, Growth Evaluation has a fixed payout policy. Unlike SELECT, where you choose between Flex (5-Day) or Daily payout policies after passing, Growth accounts use a predetermined payout structure. If you want flexibility in choosing your payout policy, consider SELECT Evaluation instead.

Q: Is there a time limit to complete Growth Evaluation?

A: No, there is no time limit to complete a Growth Evaluation. Your account remains active as long as you keep your account active and don't breach the trailing drawdown. You can take as long as you need to hit the profit target. The same applies to SELECT Evaluation - neither has a time limit.
